chinese_news.title: 浙大系创业者冲港股IPO，仙工智能招股书五大看点
chinese_news.summary:
6月15日，智能机器人公司仙工智能（06106.HK）开始招股，招股价101.60港元，每手50股，市值112.27亿港元。

仙工智能最早于2025年5月第一次向港交所递交招股书，6个月失效后，又于当年11月重新递交，直到今年6月才通过聆讯。仙工智能这次是以18C特专科技公司身份赴港上市，预计6月24日挂牌敲钟。中金独家保荐，招银国际为整体协调人。

有意思的是，这家公司的核心壁垒不在机器人本身，而在机器人的"大脑"——控制器。灼识咨询按销量计，仙工的机器人控制器全球第一、中国第一，市占率24.8%和45.2%。一个"卖大脑"的公司要上市了，但硬氪抽丝剥茧713页招股书后会发现，仙工智能有五大看点：

chinese_news.title: 把AI当「电子校医」的大学生，一个人看病不慌了
chinese_news.summary:
01.深夜急诊室：校医下班后，“电子校医”上线了

深夜11点，宿舍快熄灯了，张雯的小腹突然一阵绞痛，疼得她揪紧被子，直冒冷汗。校医室这个点已经下班了，室友说陪她去校外医院。但张雯犹豫了，大半夜不想折腾，万一一会儿就缓过来了呢？

她打开蚂蚁阿福，把自己的症状输进去，“凌晨腹部绞痛，一阵一阵的，没有拉肚子，没有发烧，也不是生理期。”

阿福很快给出分析，“大概率是腹部受凉引起的肠道痉挛，可能和夜间受凉、睡前吃了生冷辛辣的食物有关，这些都会引起小腹下坠的绞痛。”还列出了其他可能性，比如尿路小结石、排卵期疼痛等。张雯发现第一条最符合，当天确实吃了辣的东西。

阿福马上给出对策：先保暖，调整姿势，不要乱吃止痛药。如果非常痛，必须尽快就医。室友递来暖水袋，张雯敷了一会儿，腹痛果然慢慢减轻了。“居然真的管用”，第二天醒来，她跟没事人一样。

chinese_news.title: NoonWake.AI完成近千万元种子轮融资，用AI做年轻人的情绪消费品｜智能涌现首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜梁键强

编辑｜王毓婵

一句话介绍

NoonWake.AI是一家以泛心理为切入点、结合AI技术做情绪消费产品的创业公司，业务覆盖软件和硬件，并同时面向国内外市场。

目前，公司产品包括国内AI陪伴应用“万象有灵”、海外应用Starot、桌面AI陪伴硬件“好运日历机”，以及正在探索的智能水晶手串等轻硬件产品。

团队介绍

NoonWake.AI创始人兼CEO吴尚，本科毕业于中南大学，MBA就读于北京大学光华管理学院。曾先后在中兴、阿里、腾讯和小米任职，参与过OS产品、SaaS、社交产品和智能硬件相关业务。在腾讯期间，吴尚曾参与早期创业项目“我岛”，该项目曾获得600万美元融资。

其他核心成员分别负责技术研发、产品与硬件设计、GTM运营等关键模块。技术负责人喜哥曾任小爱端侧模型核心工程师，主要负责公司模型工程、AI技术架构及相关研发工作。

产品设计负责人美杰曾参与天梯项目，后

chinese_news.title: 监管约谈山姆后，沃尔玛中国多位高管变动｜独家
chinese_news.summary:
文｜ 彭倩、 任彩茹 

编辑 ｜乔芊

处于监管和舆论漩涡中的山姆迎来了新的人事调整。

36氪了解到，山姆会员商店中国 CMO（首席采购官）张青已于近日提交辞呈。对此，沃尔玛中国回应称：“衷心感谢她在任职期间对山姆业务作出的卓越贡献，并诚挚祝愿她在未来一切顺利。目前我们正在全球范围内积极物色继任人选。过渡期间，Neil Maffey将出任代理山姆会员商店首席采购官。Neil曾于2013-2017年间担任山姆首席采购官，卸任后长期担任公司全职顾问至今。”

此外，据36氪独家了解，沃尔玛中国本次人事变动还包括：

  • Tony Paladinetti，现任沃尔玛国际部战略副总裁，将

chinese_news.title: 硬氪专访 | 罗剑岚：机器人真正的Scaling Law，发生在真实部署闭环里
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 邱晓芬

编辑 | 袁斯来

过去半年，国内具身智能赛道经历了一场静悄悄的重心转移：聚光灯从硬件本体的“自由度竞赛”，逐渐移向决定机器人智能上限的深水区。

只是，当行业反复讨论“机器人能否通过暴力堆数据复刻大语言模型 ScalingLaw”时，上海创智学院副教授、智元机器人首席科学家罗剑岚，给出了一个并不随大流的判断：具身智能不能简单照搬大语言模型的发展路径。

罗剑岚的表达风格极具辨识度。他习惯在中英文专业术语之间快速切换，逻辑推进密集，很少给出模糊的折中答案。

相比停留在“数据、模型、Infra哪个更重要”的单点争论上，他更倾向于直接指出问题本身：当前具身智能的核心矛盾，不是某一个环节的单独突破，而是这些环节能否在真实部署中形成闭环。

这种判断来自他横跨学术研究与产业落地的经历。作为曾经的伯克利博士，他师从具身智能领域奠基性人物Sergey Levine（谢尔盖·列文）。毕业后，他曾任Google X与DeepMind研究科学

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 中科大博士做量子赛道“卖水人”，连续融资两轮
chinese_news.summary:
作者丨欧雪

编辑丨袁斯来

硬氪获悉，中性原子量子计算平台级核心供应商——太微量子（MQTEK）已连续完成天使轮、天使+轮融资。投资方包括英诺天使、东方嘉富、小苗朗程、云启资本、水木投资、远东远至等知名投资机构，慕石资本担任独家财务顾问。融资资金将主要用于三大核心产品矩阵的扩产与研发。

太微量子成立于2021年，专注于中性原子与离子阱两条量子计算路线的上游核心部件。团队成员来自中国科学技术大学、清华大学、浙江大学等国内外高校，聚集了量子、AI、光学、机械、硬件等各领域的前沿人才。创始人兼CEO王宣恺为中科大量子信息与量子物理方向博士，曾开发过显微镜、电流源、激光器等多款精密仪器。

王宣恺告诉硬氪，公司定位为“量子计算生态的卖水人”，不做整机，而是为下游整机企业与科研平台提供标准化、高稳定、可量产的关键部件。

目前，公司已形成三大产品线：

一是量子气体显微镜（QGM），用于单原子成像与操控。相比海外竞品，太微量子的物镜耐受功率更高、成像波段更宽（313–1700 nm），视场可

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Federal Reserve raise rates at least once by end of 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Fed median projection now calls for rates at 3.8% by end-2026 (25bp above current); Warsh's first meeting signals hawkish bias despite holding steady, 2-year yields spiked on rate-hike signals from multiple officials.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'Chairman Warsh abstains from giving rate forecast as several members signal a hike in 2026'; 'Federal funds rate to end 2026 at 3.8%'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $75,000 on any day before 2026-09-30?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Glassnode reports realized losses fell 46% with increasing bid-side liquidity and easing sell pressure; capitulation phase typically precedes rallies; macro backdrop (Iran oil blockade, Fed hold, geopolitical tension) creates volatility opportunity.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph: 'Bitcoin capitulation twice as weak after spot liquidity turns supportive'; Glassnode data on realized losses

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the CLARITY Act pass at least one chamber of Congress by 2026-12-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Gaming lobby actively pushing Senate to bar CFTC authority over prediction markets; crypto-backed GOP candidate won Alabama runoff with PAC support; prediction markets becoming a partisan issue with clear commercial stakes.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph: 'Gaming groups urge Congress to ban prediction markets sports betting in CLARITY Act'; 'Crypto-backed GOP candidate wins Alabama Senate runoff'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Trump administration resolve Iran nuclear deal dispute by 2026-08-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump explicitly signaled doubt about Iran MOU at G7; three Iranian tankers already passed US blockade; geopolitical escalation or de-escalation could drive oil prices and risk-on/risk-off asset flows.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'Trump says he likes idea of blaming Vance if Iran deal doesn't work out'; BBC: 'Iran sends tankers loaded with oil past US military blockade'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Kevin Warsh announce Fed rate cut before 2026-10-01?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Warsh's task forces signal intention to 'rewire the central bank'; Gundlach warns Warsh is not 'easy money chairman'; narrative tension between market expectations (futures pricing in cuts) and official hawkish guidance creates rich betting opportunity.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'Jeffrey Gundlach says Fed's Warsh is not going to be the easy money chairman'; 'Analysis: Chairman Kevin Warsh's task forces are the key to understanding the new Fed'

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Nvidia (NVDA) stock close above $150 at any point before 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance or NASDAQ official close data
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: No existing high-resolution prediction market on NVDA price targets; AI capex cycle and Fed rate trajectory create two-way volatility; institutional flows tied to earnings and FOMC are forecastable.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Hacker News attention to AI infrastructure (GLM-5.2, DeepSeek security concerns) and US tech policy shifts; Warsh Fed stance on inflation could impact mega-cap valuations.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Singapore's MAS formally license Bybit or remove it from Investor Alert List by 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Official MAS regulatory announcements or Bybit press release citing regulatory status change
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Bybit just added to MAS alert list; crypto exchange licensing is binary, high-stakes event; current market ignores tail risk of major Asian exchange losing regional credibility.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: 'Bybit lands on Singapore MAS Investor Alert List'; regulatory arbitrage between Singapore, Hong Kong, UAE will intensify.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Fidelity's stablecoin reserve program (announced 2026-05) onboard at least $500M in AUM by 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Fidelity investor relations announcements or third-party onchain analytics (Glassnode, Nansen)

market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: 'Fidelity joins Wall Street's race to manage stablecoin reserves'; broader tokenized assets adoption trend (Blockchain.com × Ondo Finance rollout) signals institutional demand.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will defense contractor stock buyback restrictions pass full Senate and be signed into law by 2026-10-01?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Congress.gov bill status tracker or Presidential signing announcement
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Senate Armed Services Committee already approved; Trump administration's relationship with defense sector and stock market health makes this a partisan pressure point; affects LMT, RTX, NOC, GD valuations.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: 'Defense contractors would be barred from buying back their stock in bill approved by Senate panel'; policy shifts M&A and shareholder return narratives.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin's 200-week moving average (price support) hold above $63,000 through 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: TradingView or CoinGecko historical price data (200-week MA calculation)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Capitulation signals (Glassnode) suggest macro bottom-fishing; no existing market on technical support levels; macro traders and quants underweight on-chain flow data.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: 'Bitcoin capitulation twice as weak after spot liquidity turns supportive'; Iran oil blockade and geopolitical premium could boost risk appetite and crypto inflows.

investment_theses.thesis: Fed hawkish bias under Warsh (median 3.8% by YE2026) will compress long-duration equities and favor DXY/USD strength; short high-growth tech (QQQ), long DXY or TLT puts.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Warsh's first meeting saw 2-year yields spike; multiple Fed officials signaled rate hike in 2026
CNBC: Gundlach warns Warsh is not 'easy money chairman'; reduces risk of overly accommodative policy
Warsh's task force language suggests structural Fed rewiring, not one-off rate hold
investment_theses.counter_view: Market may front-run hawkish pricing already; inflation data could surprise lower, forcing Warsh to cut; geopolitical shock (Iran, Middle East) could trigger flight-to-safety bid in long bonds.
investment_theses.expression: Short QQQ 3x inverse (PSQ) or put spreads on SPY; long DXY via UUPT or FXE; consider short 10Y Treasury position (TLT puts or short IEF).

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin capitulation cycle exhaustion (realized losses down 46%, bid-side liquidity rising) combined with Iran oil blockade and geopolitical premium suggests BTC/ETH rebound toward $70K+ by June 2026; long BTC spot or perps.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: 'Bitcoin capitulation twice as weak after spot liquidity turns supportive'
BBC: 'Iran sends tankers loaded with oil past US military blockade' — geopolitical risk premium
Glassnode: realized losses fell 46%, easing sell pressure
investment_theses.counter_view: Warsh Fed hawkishness could push macro headwinds further; Illinois crypto tax and regulatory clampdown (Kentucky prediction markets, CFTC/gaming lobby clash) could dampen retail sentiment; spot liquidity data lags execution.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot (via Grayscale IBIT, Fidelity FBTC, or spot ETF); long BTC perpetuals 2x leverage on Bybit or Hyperliquid (flagged as regulatory risk but higher leverage); hedge with short DXY.

investment_theses.thesis: Stablecoin reserve management and tokenized assets (Fidelity, Blockchain.com × Ondo) will drive institutional USDC/USDT yield compression and liquidity migration; long USDC/USDT yield positions, short high-yield money market ETFs (e.g., VMFXX competitors).
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Fidelity joins Wall Street's race to manage stablecoin reserves'
CoinDesk: 'Blockchain.com deepens onchain stock offerings as tokenized equities market grows'
36Kr (Chinese): no specific stablecoin push flagged, but AI + robotics capex could drive onchain settlement demand
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory uncertainty (SEC, FinCEN) could slow TradFi stablecoin adoption; traditional money market funds still offer higher yields and no custody/smart contract risk; tokenized asset market remains niche.
investment_theses.expression: Long USDC/DAI staking yields via Aave or Lido; take basis spreads (USDC-USDT premium arb); short money market ETFs (SHV puts) or long USDC calls if derivatives available; monitor Fidelity USDX product launch.

investment_theses.thesis: Crypto policy bifurcation: GOP-backed crypto candidates winning (Alabama runoff, PAC spending) while CLARITY Act and CFTC authority clash persist; prediction markets and decentralized protocols will face regulatory tailwinds in red states and headwinds federally; long decentralized prediction market tokens (UMA, HYPE if correlated) and meme-friendly narratives, short centralized US exchanges (COIN short straddle).
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: 'Crypto-backed GOP candidate wins Alabama Senate runoff with June primaries looming'
Cointelegraph: 'Gaming groups urge Congress to ban prediction markets sports betting in CLARITY Act'
CoinDesk: 'Kentucky targets prediction markets, puts red state in potential clash with Trump team'
investment_theses.counter_view: Federal preemption unlikely before 2027; CFTC can move unilaterally on enforcement; Coinbase (COIN) compliance strategy may prove resilient; prediction markets are still tiny slice of crypto market capitalization.
investment_theses.expression: Long Hyperliquid (HYPE) or Uniswap governance (UNI) as proxy for DEX regulatory tailwinds; short COIN or neutral straddle; monitor 36Kr for Chinese prediction market moves (no regulation equivalent flagged yet, but opportunity).

investment_theses.thesis: China's 'AI+' strategy push (36Kr: 国务院 AI+ action plan) and robotics scaling (硬氪 focus on embodied AI deployment loops) will drive demand for quantum computing tools and neutral-atom platforms; Metaqi (太微量子) and similar hard tech plays are early-stage capital plays but signal macro theme; long TSMC, ASML, MU as picks-and-shovels; monitor Chinese robotics IPOs (仙工智能 HK IPO mid-June at HK$112.27B valuation).
supporting_signals: 36Kr: '国务院：深入实施人工智能+行动，探索人机协同的新型工作形态' (state-level AI+ action plan with human-machine collaboration)
36Kr: '仙工智能 HK IPO招股价101.60港元…预计6月24日挂牌' (robotics unicorn IPO mid-June 2026, HK$112B valuation)
36Kr: '太微量子已连续完成天使轮、天使+轮融资' (quantum computing platform raising venture capital; Scaling Law for robotics depends on compute)
investment_theses.counter_view: Chinese tech export restrictions (US chip bans) may limit TSMC/ASML upside; robotics adoption slower in China than hype suggests; quantum computing remains 5+ years from practical advantage; valuations already rich (仙工智能 IPO at premium).
investment_theses.expression: Long TSMC (TSM) or ASML (ASML) as picks-and-shovels for AI capex; long MU (Micron) for memory cycles; avoid direct exposure to Chinese robotics IPOs due to delisting risk; track 香港上市 robotics valuations as gauge of investor sentiment.
